name: Frozen Lady Heath Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and sides of an 8-inch springform pan with ladyfingers, cutting them to fit.
2. Dissolve the coffee in boiling water.
3. Cool the mixture.
4. Crush 4 Heath Bars carefully, being careful not to smash them.
5. Combine the crushed bars with the dissolved coffee and softened ice cream. Spoon this mixture into the prepared pan and freeze until firm.
6. Whip the remaining ingredients (creaming) until stiff.
7. Spread the whipped topping over the frozen ice cream mixture in the pan.
8. Crush the remaining Heath Bars and sprinkle them over the whipped cream layer.
9. Cover with foil and freeze until firm.
10. Cut into wedges to serve.
